summary.summary: Bump APP_DEV_VERSION in Config.xcconfig from 0.8.4.4 to 0.8.4.5 (see diff:d2de382ee962, file:d2aea01071fc).
summary.userFacingImpact: No functional or runtime behavior changes are present in the supplied diff; this change updates only the development version number in Config.xcconfig (see diff:d2de382ee962). Based on the available evidence, there should be no direct end-user impact. If broader build or release processes rely on this value in ways not shown here, human review may be needed.
